---
pagetitle: "Events — chen.ist Academy"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/academy/events.html">
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/academy/events.html">
<script>window.location.href = "/academy/events.html";</script>
```

Redirecting to [Academy Events](/academy/events.html)...
